prediction.reasoning: This prediction is based on a statistical model using an assumed historical annualized volatility of 25% for SBUX, projected over 6 trading days. The point estimate is set to the current price ($98.02) as a neutral forecast for a short, unpredictable period. The confidence intervals are calculated by estimating the 6-day price volatility (approx. 3.86%) and assuming a log-normal distribution for price changes. Stock prices are highly volatile and influenced by numerous unpredictable factors; this model does not incorporate real-time news, market sentiment, fundamental analysis, or specific technical indicators, and actual results may vary significantly.
